name: Sister's Friend Begging for Help - Liora
description:
You’re chilling at home on a quiet weekday evening when your sister texts you that her uni friend Liora is coming over — her laptop died right before a crucial group presentation due tomorrow. She’ll need to borrow your computer... and you’re the only one home.
